tool_args.label: Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards Select Bus Service
payload.description: Proposed SBS service on Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards with main road bus lanes on Woodhaven Blvd and offset bus lanes on Cross Bay Blvd

evidence_refs.source_quote: Proposed designs for Q52 and Q53 Select Bus Service on Woodhaven & Cross Bay Boulevards
NYCDOT and the MTA have chosen main road bus lanes for Woodhaven Boulevard and offset bus lanes for Cross Bay Boulevard.

tool_args.label: Main road bus lanes on Woodhaven Boulevard

payload.description: Main road bus lanes improve bus speed and reliability; no conflicts with turning vehicles or parking

tool_args.label: Service roads on Woodhaven Boulevard

payload.location_text: Woodhaven Boulevard between Eliot Avenue and Park Lane South
payload.description: Calmed service roads create designated space for parking, deliveries, and local access. Service roads will be added between Eliot Avenue and Park Lane South and maintained in existing locations along the corridor.

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven Boulevard between Eliot Avenue and Park Lane South

evidence_refs.source_quote: Calmed service roads create designated space for parking, deliveries, and local access
Service roads will be added between Eliot Avenue and Park Lane South and maintained in existing locations along the corridor

tool_args.label: Off-board fare collection

payload.description: Off-board fare collection will make riding the Q52/53 more reliable and faster

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus only lanes and off-board fare collection will make riding the Q52/53 more reliable and 25-35% faster.

tool_args.label: New medians and pedestrian refuges

payload.description: New medians shorten pedestrian crossing distances and create a safe place for pedestrians to wait. Medians serve as pedestrian refuges, shortening the crossing distance at intersections, and helping calm traffic in the service roads.

evidence_refs.source_quote: New medians shorten pedestrian crossing distances and create a safe place for pedestrians to wait
Medians serve as pedestrian refuges, shortening the crossing distance at intersections, and helping calm traffic in the service roads

tool_args.label: All buses can use bus lanes

payload.claim_text: All buses - local, express and SBS - will be able to use the bus lanes. Improved subway and rail transfers will also benefit bus riders.
payload.subject: bus lanes on Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards

evidence_refs.source_quote: All buses - local, express and SBS - will be able to use the bus lanes. Improved subway and rail transfers will also benefit bus riders.

tool_args.label: Traffic analysis underway

payload.claim_text: Traffic analysis for the proposed design is currently underway. The analysis will help inform transit operations, signal timing (including longer pedestrian crossing times and more green time for Woodhaven/Cross Bay) and the need for left and right turning bays.
payload.subject: proposed design for Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards

evidence_refs.source_quote: Traffic analysis for the proposed design is currently underway.

tool_args.label: Preferred corridor design refinement over summer 2015

payload.claim_text: Over the summer, DOT and the MTA will refine the proposed designs based on community feedback and further technical review, including detailed traffic analysis.
payload.subject: proposed designs for Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards

evidence_refs.source_quote: Over the summer, DOT and the MTA will refine the proposed designs based on community feedback and further technical review, including detailed traffic analysis.
